'''Bryn Apice''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]]. Bryn, his brother [[Wes Apice|Wes]], and their friend [[Rayt (civilian)|Rayt]] were in the midst of journeying off-planet with when they discovered a funds transfer in a local bank. Donning [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone]] armor, the three located the funds but were caught, though they still appeared to be troopers. They were stationed to move the funds onto the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] starship, and remained there as it blasted off, journeying to an unknown destination.
